name: Puppy Chow
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the peanut butter, butter or margarine, and chocolate chips in a saucepan over medium heat.
2. Pour the melted mixture over the Corn Chex cereal, ensuring all cereal is coated.
3. Place the powdered sugar in a large paper bag.
4. Add the cooled Corn Chex cereal to the bag and gently shake until all cereal is coated with powdered sugar.
5. Spread the mixture out on wax paper to cool completely before serving.
